products.description_raw:
Ceramide complex + Cholesterol + Free Fatty Acids + Niacinamide + Colloidal Oatmeal + Hyaluronic Acid - 50 g 
The perfect skin barrier fortifying moisturizer for oily-combination, acne-prone, and sensitive skin. This lightweight, non-comedogenic, oil-free moisturizer combines the power of Ceramide Complex, Cholesterol, and Free Fatty Acids to strengthen your skin’s barrier while keeping it resilient and healthy.
Formulated with Niacinamide, this gel cream brightens skin, controls excess oil, and balances breakout-prone skin, making it a must-have for clear, radiant skin. The soothing blend of Colloidal Oat and Allantoin reduces redness and irritation, ensuring comfort for even the most sensitive skin.
Its lightweight gel texture absorbs instantly, making it perfect for day or night use, even under makeup. Say goodbye to heavy, greasy moisturizers and hello to all-day hydration and nourishment.

details_sections.heading: Description
details_sections.body:
The skin barrier is everything when it comes to healthy, glowing, balanced skin. When it's damaged, you’ll notice more oiliness, breakouts, dullness, dryness, and sensitivity. 

Barrier Relief Ceramide Moisturizer is your everyday solution to restore, protect, and balance acne-prone, oily-combination, and sensitive skin types .

Powered by skin essential ceramides, brightening niacinamide, hydrating hyaluronic acid, and calming colloidal oat, this lightweight, non-comedogenic gel-cream absorbs fast and leaves zero grease. It hydrates, soothes, and repairs without clogging pores—making it ideal for day or night use, even under makeup. Say goodbye to heavy, greasy moisturizers and hello to all-day hydration and nourishment.

PRO TIP 
Use it consistently , even when your skin feels okay. Prevention is way easier than fixing a damaged barrier.

details_sections.heading: Benefits
details_sections.body:
- Strengthens skin barrier

- Brightens & hydrates

- Control excess oil

- Balances acne prone skin

- Reduces redness, irritation & skin sensitivity

NON COMEDOGENIC, FRAGRANCE FREE, HYPOALLERGIC FREE , VEGAN, CRUELTY FREE

details_sections.heading: Key Ingredients
details_sections.body:
Ceramide Complex + Cholesterol + Free Fatty Acids 
Skin Barrier Fortifying Lipids in the perfect ratio strengthens skin barrier 

Niacinamide 
Brightens, reduces excess oil and balances breakout prone skin

Colloidal Oat + Allantoin 
Soothes sensitive skin - Reduces skin irritation and redness

Hyaluronic acid + Panthenol (Vitamin B5) + Glycerin 
Makes skin hydrated and supple

details_sections.heading: How To Use
details_sections.body:
Apply liberally on a cleansed skin. Can be used both AM (before suncreen) and PM (as the last step of your skincare routine)
You can also use this moisturizer to prep the skin before makeup for a flawless finish
Barrier Relief Moisturizer can be incorporated seamlessly in your skincare routine as it can be used alone alongside your cleanser and sunscreen (when your skin is sensitized) or with other active ingredient based products

details_sections.heading: FULL INGREDIENTS
details_sections.body: Water, caprylic/ capric triglyceride, glycerin, niacinamide, propanediol, cetearyl alcohol, cetearyl olivate, sorbitan olivate, sodium hyaluronate, colloidal oatmeal, panthenol, allantoin, ceramide np, ceramide ap, ceramide eop, phytosphingosine, cholesterol, linoleic acid, sodium lauroyl lactylate, xanthan gum, butylene glycol, carbomer, tocopherol, phenoxyethanol, dimethicone, disodium edta, linolenic acid, ethylhexylglycerin
